task.name: cleanup-numeric-emails-r11-20260607
task.description: R11: fix definitivo — script en una línea (CDATA inline), replaceRealValues(emptyList()), raw(). Canary PASS: 7e21d884 (201440023 / 201440023@upeu.edu.pe) borrado exitosamente. Scope: ~21,214 emails numéricos activos restantes.

s:script.c:code: import com.evolveum.midpoint.xml.ns._public.common.common_3.UserType; def user = input; def uoid = user.getOid(); def uname = user.getName()?.getOrig(); def email = user.getEmailAddress(); if (email == null || email.toString().trim().isEmpty()) { return; }; def emailStr = email.toString().trim(); if (!emailStr.matches('^\\d+@upeu\\.edu\\.pe$')) { return; }; try { def delta = midpoint.prismContext.deltaFor(UserType.class).item(UserType.F_EMAIL_ADDRESS).replaceRealValues(java.util.Collections.emptyList()).asObjectDelta(uoid); def meoClass = Class.forName('com.evolveum.midpoint.model.api.ModelExecuteOptions'); def opts = meoClass.getMethod('create').invoke(null); opts = opts.getClass().getMethod('raw').invoke(opts); midpoint.executeChanges([delta] as java.util.Collection, opts); log.warn('EMAIL-r11 OK: {} ({}) was {}', uname, uoid, emailStr); } catch (Exception e) { log.warn('EMAIL-r11 ERR: {} ({}): {}', uname, uoid, e.message); }
